name_en: M25359 Beige M24639 Black M24640 Brown Chip
name_cn:
M25359 Beige M24639 Black M24640 Brown Chip
This Soft Twist bag is crafted from soft calfskin, reinterpreting the iconic Twist bag in a generous size. Weathered metal hardware shines with a striking look, while the design and multiple carrying ways ensure a comfortable travel experience. Dimensions: 27*19*9cm.
